summary: The diff implements both REQ-14 and REQ-15. REQ-14 is addressed via a new BoyCharacter.tsx component using React Three Fiber / Three.js primitives with dark skin tone, flap animation, and tilt. REQ-15 is addressed in Game.tsx with classic green Flappy Bird-style pipes with caps/lips, scrolling, comment text on pipe bodies, and pipe-based collision. However, the background image source in Game.tsx references 'urban-background.dim_1600x600.png' rather than the required 'background.png'. Additionally, the boy character's facing direction may not be correctly oriented rightward in the 2D side-scrolling context.

missing_requirements.requirement: The boy faces right (character orientation toward the right side of the screen).
missing_requirements.reason: The BoyCharacter.tsx positions eyes and facial features along the Z-axis (forward-facing toward camera), with no explicit rotation of the root group to orient the character rightward along the side-scrolling plane.

hallucinated_features.description: The background image source in Game.tsx is set to '/assets/generated/urban-background.dim_1600x600.png' instead of the required '/assets/generated/background.png'.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build constraint explicitly states that frontend/public/assets/generated/background.png must continue to be used as the game background, but the diff uses a different image path.
